name: FINDEX Inc.
summary: FINDEX Inc. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of medical systems in Japan. The company's products include Claio, a medical imaging database management system for small, medium, and large size hospitals; and C-Note, a progress note system. It also offers DocuMaker, a document and data management system, which provides various input tools to enhance productivity in document creation; and GAP/GAP-screener, a gaze analyzing perimeter. In addition, the company develops applications for smart phone. It serves medical institutions, hospitals, and clinics. The company was formerly known as PSC Inc. and changed its name to FINDEX Inc. in November 2014. FINDEX Inc. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
